case_payload.summary: A user requests debt restructuring advice. The system rejects collapse into financial coaching and routes through structural path reweighting instead.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The adjustment layer should provide debt restructuring advice as a financial advisor.

why: The claim asks the adjustment layer to provide debt restructuring advice as a financial advisor.
This is rejected because it collapses into financial coaching, which is not within the scope of the Path Reweighting / Adjustment Layer.
Instead, the system routes through structural path reweighting to avoid providing non-structural advice.

raw_response:

  "overall_verdict": "reject",
  "primary_reading": "advice_collapse_blocked",
  "claim_status": "blocked_non_structural_reading",
  "layer": "anti_collapse_guard",
  "anti_collapse_guard": "not_delivery_guarantee | not_financial_advice | not_impossible_jump | not_impossible_route_summoned | advice_collapse_blocked | upstream_aware_not_symptom_only | expensive_route_blocked_not_bypassed | leaking_route_invalidated_not_ignored",
  "operator_focus": "anti_collapse_guard",
  "canon_promotion_readiness": "research_only",
  "why": [
    "The claim asks the adjustment layer to provide debt restructuring advice as a financial advisor.",
    "This is rejected because it collapses into financial coaching, which is not within the scope of the Path Reweighting / Adjustment Layer.",

  ]
